fixtures.name: demonstrative-name-list
fixtures.content: Common verb-as-name first names include: Bob, Mark, Rob, Frank, and Pat. None of these are real people in this context.

fixtures.name: brainstorm-with-single-directive
fixtures.content: Brainstorm follow-up candidates: surveillance metrics, customer journey, capacity planning, cost transparency, hire-vs-buy. Pick one for the next planning cycle.

fixtures.name: meta-discussion-of-contamination
fixtures.content: Probe E at v11 emitted Sarah in both people and entities. The disjointness validator catches this contamination pattern by stripping the duplicate from entities.

fixtures.content: Configure pgvector's HNSW index parameters for the production corpus. Tune ef_construction and m based on recall-vs-latency benchmarks.

fixtures.name: postgres-no-people-control
fixtures.content: Postgres autovacuum thresholds are tunable per-table. Tables with high write-churn benefit from a lower scale_factor.
